title: create and ad astra
description: expirience steam punk style survival with the crate mod and have the option for space exploration with ad astra
body:
The create and ad astra modpack aims to improve the vanilla experience. The main appeal of the modpack are the create mod and ad astra. The modpack is aimed at people who want the vanilla feel of the game while also having more options for farms, exploration, and other fun experiences. It also includes qol and performance mods to ensure a smooth experience.

The modpack was created for a server with friends, so I can confirm it works great in a multiplayer setting, but you can also play it alone. If you decide to play it in multiplayer, there are also included some fun mods to troll your friends with, such as bewitchment.
